Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x3000 "TETRIS-MIRRORSOFT-3000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Tetris (Mirrorsoft).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Moved the game startup code from $02A7 to $3000 to ensure it was above the dump start address of $0400.
